name: AniKai
description: Anime streaming platform with fast servers and a minimal interface. Supports both sub and dub playback.

name: Anime-Planet
description: Legal anime streaming through Crunchyroll partnership offering thousands of episodes. Also functions as anime discovery platform with user reviews, recommendations, watchlists, and community features.

name: AnimeEZ
description: Completely ad-free anime streaming website built with HTML. Features no pop-ups, no ads, and straightforward access to anime content.

name: Animeflv
description: Popular Spanish-language anime streaming platform with consistent performance across regions. Features extensive library of subbed and dubbed content with regular updates.

name: AnimeFreak
description: Long-standing free anime platform with vast library of classic and ongoing series. Features organized categories and reliable backup servers for consistent access.

name: AnimeHeaven
description: Watch anime online for free with a large library of subbed and dubbed titles. No account required.

name: AnimePahe
description: Popular anime streaming platform known for ad-light experience and direct download options. Features subbed content with fast loading and clean interface for minimalist users.

name: Animetsu
description: Free anime streaming with a clean interface. Browse a wide range of subbed and dubbed series updated regularly.

name: AniMixPlay
description: Feature-rich anime platform with focus on simplicity and user experience. Offers watch progress tracking, multiple sources, and clean interface for seamless anime discovery.

name: anipy.stream
description: Open-source, self-hosted anime streaming server with 100% ad-free experience. Features ultra-fast streaming and direct downloads from AnimePahe through a lightweight FastAPI backend.

name: AniwatchX
description: Clean, fast, and ad-free anime streaming platform with modern UI. Features high-quality streams, dark mode, mobile-friendly design, and no pop-ups or clutter.

name: GogoAnime
description: One of the most established free anime sites with extensive library including both subbed and dubbed content. Features daily updates, user-friendly interface, and genre-based browsing.

name: Hoopla
description: Free streaming service available through participating public libraries. Access anime titles using your library card with no ads and high-quality streams.

name: Miruro
description: Niche anime platform focusing on user experience with modern design and minimal buffering. Features clean interface and smooth playback for uninterrupted viewing.

name: NepoFlix
description: Open-source platform offering free movies, TV shows, and anime with no sign-ups or subscriptions. Features modern interface, multiple backup sources, mobile-friendly design, and download options.

name: Peacock Free
description: Free tier offering major shonen titles including Naruto, Hunter x Hunter, and Jujutsu Kaisen. Perfect for mainstream anime fans who don't want to pay.

name: Plex
description: Free ad-supported streaming platform with a growing anime selection. Features on-demand content and live TV channels, available on all major devices.

name: Pluto TV
description: Free live and on-demand anime streaming with 24/7 anime channels. Features 800+ hours of content including Naruto, Bleach, One Piece, and an 'Anime x HIDIVE' co-branded channel.

name: RetroCrush
description: Dedicated free streaming service focused on classic and vintage anime titles. Perfect for fans of old-school anime, featuring cult classics and rare retro titles with ad-supported viewing.

name: Sling TV Freestream
description: Free platform combining multiple free streaming channels including RetroCrush. Features classic anime, sneak peeks from Cartoon Network and Adult Swim, including Uzumaki and Attack on Titan content.

name: Tubi TV
description: 100% free, legal anime streaming with a huge library of classics, cult favorites, and niche titles. Features a solid anime section including Naruto, Pokémon, Sailor Moon, Toradora!, and films by Satoshi Kon and Naoko Yamada.

name: YouTube
description: Official anime uploads from distributors like Viz Media, Muse Asia, and Ani-One Asia. Free access to full episodes and movies including InuYasha, Naruto, and Sailor Moon with official subtitles.
